name: DeepResearch2-MCP-Server
description: MCP Server for OpenAI Deep Research API integration

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Your OpenAI API key for Deep Research API access

DATABASE_URL.description: Database connection URL (provided by Heroku PostgreSQL addon)

addons.notes: The default plan has been updated to 'standard-0', which is more suitable for production use. However, you should evaluate your application's expected usage and upgrade to a higher-tier plan (e.g., 'premium-0') if needed to handle larger datasets and more concurrent connections.
